title: EnviTecÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s 23 Years of Expertise Optimize Chicken Manure for RNG in the US Market
content: Germany's largest biogas producer, EnviTec Biogas AG, has been leveraging chicken manure for the production of biogas, renewable natural gas (RNG), and bio-Liquified Natural Gas (LNG) for an impressive 23 years. The company is now actively exploring opportunities in the growing U.S. market for the anaerobic digestion of poultry manure, aligning its expertise with the increasing demand for sustainable waste-to-energy solutions.
author: Analysts Account
